current_objective: Net-new discovery cycle (runtime priority 3, project 01 operator-gated). This cycle DELIBERATELY LEFT regulatory-compliance (per ADR-014) and picked an operational/financial money-leak: ocean-freight Demurrage & Detention (D&D) overcharge dispute & recovery (importers/BCOs/3PLs; FMC May-2024 billing rule as a tailwind, not the product; targeting the OPP-001b contested-recovery + record-reconstruction shape). KILLED at the vacuum screen before deep research. Scored OPP-005 at 64/100 -> ARCHIVE (second Archived row). Disprove won decisively: the artifact is already shipped on BOTH sides -- prevention/visibility (Windward shipped a dedicated AI 'D&D Automation' product Feb-2025; BuyCo @97% carriers; Cargoo; FourKites; Portcast) AND contested recovery (nVision Global, OceanAudit.com, Cass, STB, Auditec -- a mature contingency freight-audit industry). CompWk 6, Defens 5, AI 5 (commoditized). KEY META (ADR-015): capping a NON-compliance pick FALSIFIES the ADR-014 hypothesis that 'leave compliance' was the fix -- the real binding constraint is VISIBLE/NAMED MONEY POOLS (any pain with a headline $-stat already recruited incumbents on both prevention and recovery), of which compliance regs were just one instance. 5 consecutive caps (79/71/72/63/64) vs the one 83 (OPP-001b, which won on an un-productized sub-wedge, not pool size). Still no 2nd >=80 project; project 01 still HOLD/operator-gated.
